content: Our paper is accepted by ICML 2026 Main! This is my first submission to ICML!
Our paper is accepted by ACL 2026 Main!
Our paper is published at Neurocomputing!
We launched the first standardized testing website for Traditional Chinese Medicine – TCM-Eval, and simultaneously trained a SOTA model in the field of TCM!
Our paper is published at Nature Communications!
We have 1 papers accepted by ACL 2025 Findings! This is my first submission!
